Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search the loan origination system for all loans where Stephanie Boyd is the realtor using mortgage_los_search_loans with a query related to "Stephanie Boyd" or "Boyd" (or similar). Note: mortgage_los_search_loans describes its search scope as "borrower name, loan number, property address, or lender" -- realtor_name is not explicitly listed as a searchable field, so the query may or may not match on realtor. If it does not, the agent may need to discover Stephanie's referral loans indirectly by searching emails for Stephanie Boyd correspondence to extract borrower names or loan numbers, then looking those up in LOS individually. The agent needs to discover that Stephanie Boyd is the realtor on 17 total Keystone loans, but only 6 are assigned to Amy Chen (los_staff_4d01ebef3a15): LN-2024-00122 (closed, $429,400 FHA), LN-2024-00197 (closed, $720,000 FHA), LN-2024-00201 (closed, $279,300 conventional), LN-2025-00301 (closed, $474,000 FHA), LN-2025-00390 (processing, $182,700 conventional -- borrower withdrawn), and LN-2026-00552 (clear_to_close, $243,200 conventional -- closing date was April 8, 2026). The agent must filter results to only Amy's loans, not report all 17.
OE 2: Retrieve detailed loan records for each of Amy's Stephanie Boyd referral loans using mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number "LN-2024-00122", then "LN-2024-00197", "LN-2024-00201", "LN-2025-00301", "LN-2025-00390", "LN-2026-00552" (or mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id with the corresponding loan IDs los_loan_d5a372783d06, los_loan_b34ad221c96d, los_loan_4ba2193eb71a, los_loan_af73be9a8ca0, los_loan_480f8173a653, los_loan_0d01df321ea7). Each record returns status, loan_amount, purchase_price, loan_type, rate, closing_date, realtor_name, realtor_email (stephanie.boyd@icloud.com), borrower_id, and assigned_lo. The total closed loan volume across the 4 closed loans is $1,902,700.
OE 3: Look up the Jennifer Romano borrower record using mortgage_los_search_borrowers with a query related to "Jennifer Romano" (or similar) or mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id with borrower_id "los_borrower_cfe8bfcbcf0f". The agent needs to discover that Jennifer Romano's borrower status is "withdrawn" -- this is the critical finding that the deal fell apart. The loan record (LN-2025-00390) still shows status "processing," creating a discrepancy that the agent must reconcile: the borrower withdrew but nobody updated the loan status.
OE 4: Check the document checklist on the Jennifer Romano loan using mortgage_los_get_documents with loan_id "los_loan_480f8173a653" to discover whether documents are sitting incomplete, which the prompt specifically asks about ("are there docs sitting in limbo?"). The loan has 10 document checklist items (URLA, Pay Stubs, Bank Statements, W2, 1040, Loan Estimate, Purchase Contract, Title Commitment, Tax Bill, HOA Letter) -- all with status "received."
OE 5: While retrieving detailed loan records in OE 2, the agent should discover that LN-2026-00552 (Teresa Johnson / Anthony Johnson, co-borrowers) is still in play from Stephanie Boyd. This loan has status "clear_to_close" with a closing date of April 8, 2026 -- 20 days before the fixed universe date of April 28, 2026. The agent needs to flag this as a file that should have closed but hasn't, or confirm it did close. The loan details: $243,200 conventional loan at 6.375%, processor Elena Marchetti (los_staff_c6b42763fb1f), assigned to Amy. The agent may also call mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number "LN-2026-00552" for full details if not already retrieved in OE 2.
OE 6: Search QuickBooks for invoices related to Stephanie Boyd's referral borrowers using quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria related to the borrower names or loan numbers discovered in OE 2. The agent needs to find broker compensation invoices to calculate total revenue earned from Stephanie's referrals. Known invoices include KMP-00197 for Michael Kumar (LN-2024-00197) at $5,204.66 broker compensation. The agent may also search quickbooks_search_bills for any vendor bills tied to these loans.
OE 7: Search emails for correspondence with Stephanie Boyd using search_emails with a query related to "Stephanie Boyd" or "stephanie.boyd" or "Boyd" (or similar). The agent needs to discover the email history involving Stephanie, including ~45 emails where stephanie.boyd@icloud.com appears as sender, recipient, or CC -- covering purchase agreements, title orders, closing coordination, and general transaction communications across multiple loan files. This helps gauge the relationship temperature and informs the outreach email content.
OE 8: Search emails for internal discussions about Amy's performance and borrower complaints using search_emails with a query related to "Amy Chen" or "complaint" or "performance" (or similar). The agent needs to discover: (a) Grace Yamamoto's email to Robert Calloway documenting performance concerns (email_email_93aa824e19cf, March 8, 2026), (b) Carlos Mendez's complaint email about Amy on LN-2026-00609 (email_email_29fc9fbc97d1, March 8, 2026), (c) Tiffany Brooks' complaint email about Amy on LN-2026-00211 (email_email_a6e1f18341d3, March 8, 2026), and (d) Grace's private check-in scheduling with Amy (email_email_dcc28b1ac465, March 8, 2026).
OE 9: Search Slack messages for internal discussions about Amy's files and performance using conversations_search_messages with search_query related to "Amy" or "complaint" or "huddle" (or similar). The agent needs to discover: (a) Grace's message that Amy missed the 8:30 huddle (March 3, channel C002), (b) Elena's message asking about Amy's status on LN-2026-00609 (March 5, channel C002), (c) Amy's incoherent Slack messages (March 7, channel C002), (d) Grace's messages about borrower complaints on Amy's files (March 8, channel C002), and (e) Natasha's private DM raising concern about Amy (March 8, channel D_GRACE_NATASHA).
OE 10: Look up Stephanie Boyd's contact information using contacts_search_contacts with a query related to "Stephanie Boyd" or "Boyd". The agent will discover that Stephanie Boyd IS in the contacts database (contact_id: realtor_601383c71301, email: stephanie.boyd@icloud.com, job: "Realtor -- Ivester Jackson Christie's", phone: (980) 371-7635, city: Charlotte). The agent can obtain her email address directly from this contact record. Note: Stephanie has a contacts record but does NOT have a CRM contact record -- this distinction matters for OE 13 (CRM engagement note).
OE 11: Look up Grace Yamamoto's email address for the CC field using contacts_search_contacts with a query related to "Grace Yamamoto" or "Grace". Expected result: grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com.
OE 12: Send an email to Stephanie Boyd from Amy using send_email with sender "amy.chen@keystonemortgage.com", recipients ["stephanie.boyd@icloud.com"], cc ["grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com"], subject related to referral partnership update or retention outreach (or similar), and content that includes combined production numbers from the 4 closed loans ($1,902,700 total volume), honest acknowledgment of the rough patch without excuses, and a clear status on every active file -- the Jennifer Romano withdrawal on LN-2025-00390 and the LN-2026-00552 (Teresa Johnson) clear-to-close status with the overdue April 8 closing date.
OE 13: Create a CRM engagement note documenting the Stephanie Boyd outreach and findings using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE" (or "EMAIL"), body summarizing the investigation findings -- Stephanie's referral track record (6 loans, 4 closed, $1,902,700 volume), Jennifer Romano withdrawal, LN-2026-00552 overdue status, revenue figures, and retention outreach sent. Note: Stephanie Boyd has no CRM contact record, so the agent may create the engagement without contact_ids, or may first create a CRM contact for Stephanie using crm_create_contact with full_name "Stephanie Boyd" and email "stephanie.boyd@icloud.com" and then attach the engagement to the new contact_id.
OE 14: Post a message in the #sales-pipeline Slack channel using conversations_add_message with channel_id "C006" and payload containing a heads-up that Amy is actively working to retain Stephanie Boyd as a referral partner, with brief context on the outreach sent and the relationship status. The agent may first need to call channels_list with channel_types "public_channel" to discover that #sales-pipeline is channel C006.
OE 15: Flag the Jennifer Romano loan file in the LOS using mortgage_los_add_activity with loan_id "los_loan_480f8173a653", action related to "note" or "status_update" (or similar), and detail summarizing that the borrower withdrew and the loan is effectively dead -- e.g., "Borrower Jennifer Romano withdrew. Loan status was never updated from processing. Flagging file as dead so no one else works it. Stephanie Boyd (referring realtor) not yet notified -- outreach in progress." The author field should reference Amy Chen or the agent. Alternatively, the agent may use mortgage_los_update_loan with loan_id "los_loan_480f8173a653" and status "withdrawn" to align the loan status with the borrower record.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
